description_long: This is a large, rectangular residential house with a prominent, dark gable roof featuring multiple dormers. The front facade includes a wide covered porch supported by columns, a central entryway with steps, and a garage on one side. The property is surrounded by a paved area and landscaped with trees and shrubs, and the backyard features a swimming pool, patio furniture, and additional outdoor amenities. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows along the front and rear, with double-hung and possibly picture window styles. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and Ranch architectural influences, with a focus on spaciousness and outdoor living.
description: A large, light-colored house with a dark gable roof, wide front porch, symmetrical windows, and landscaped yard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide covered porch, central entryway with steps, garage on the right, and landscaping including a tree and shrub.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the complex roof structure, and the garage area with additional backyard features visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard amenities such as the swimming pool, patio furniture, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear landscaping, pool, and the full extent of the roof's dormers and gables.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, wide covered porch, columns, and a prominent overhang
